relay.helpIntro: [XX-Run your own MCP agent and it will answer prompts from this chat using your subscription.-XX]
relay.tokenStep: [XX-First, create a Personal Access Token in <link>User Settings -> API access</link>, then use it below.-XX]
relay.step2: [XX-Connect the agent to Monize using Claude CLI:-XX]
relay.allowToolsNote: [XX-Exit Claude and restart it with this switch so it auto-approves every Monize tool call:-XX]
relay.step3: [XX-Start an agent loop so Claude listens for queries from Monize:-XX]
relay.loopPrompt: [XX-Loop forever: call get_next_prompt; if hasPrompt is false, call it again; otherwise handle the request with the Monize tools and call post_response with the answer; then repeat.-XX]
relay.codexNote: [XX-Add this to ~/.codex/config.toml, set MONIZE_TOKEN to your token, then run codex and paste the prompt above.-XX]
